    G

    getByteFilter(int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the filter mask of a byte in this struct.
    getByteFormat(int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the format specifier of a byte in this struct.
    getByteParams(int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns all parameter names of a byte in this struct.
    getCheckSum() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Returns the checksum stored in this data struct.
    getData() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the data bytes of this struc.
    getData() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns a copy of this SysEx message data content.
    getDefaultMidiValue() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the default MIDI value.
    getDefMidiValue(char) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the default MIDI value of a parameter.
    getDescr() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the parameter name (as seen on hardware instrument).
    getDevNum() - Methode in Schnittstelle de.btu.kt.syx.midi.ISysexMessageListener
    Returns the device number of the hardware instrument associated with the listener.
    getFileExtension(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Returns the file extension.
    getHostName() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Returns the host name.
    getIntRange(int, int) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Returns a range of integers.
    getLength() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the length of this struct in bytes.
    getLength() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns the total length of the system exclusive message in bytes, including the status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7) and the end-of-exclusive byte (EOX, 0xF7).
    getLogID() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.test.ASyxTestCase
     
    getLogID() - Methode in Schnittstelle de.btu.kt.syx.util.ILogger
    Returns the ID of this logger (max. 8 characters).
    getLogID() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
     
    getLogID() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.SysexRecorder
     
    getMessage() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns a copy of the complete system exclusive message.
    getMessages() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.AAppc.ErrorReport
     
    getMidiInDevice() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Returns the MIDI in device of this interface.
    getMidiInterfaceName() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.test.ASyxTestCase
     
    getMidiOutDevice() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Returns the MIDI out device of this interface.
    getMidiValue(char) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the MIDI value of a parameter.
    getMidiValue(String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns the MIDI value of a parameter.
    getMidiValueRange() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the MIDI value range.
    getMidiValues() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns an array of permissible MIDI values for enumerated parameters or null for range parameters.
    getModelValue(char) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the model value of a parameter.
    getModelValue(String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns the model value of a parameter.
    getModelValueAsString(char) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns a string representation of the model value of a parameter.
    getModelValueAsString(String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns a string representation of the model value of a parameter.
    getModelValueRange() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the model value range.
    getModelValues() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the permissible model values.
    getName() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the name of this struct, may be null.
    getName() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Returns the name of this MIDI interface.
    getOffsValue() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the model value offset.
    getParamBitCount(char) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the number of data bits available for a parameter.
    getParamChangeMsgFormat() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the format specifier of the system exclusive parameter change message, may be null.
    getParamInfo(char) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the parameter info of a parameter.
    getParamInfo(String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns parameter information for a unique parameter name (UID).
    getParamNames() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns a character array containing all parameter names of this struct
    getParamType(char) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Returns the type of a parameter.
    getParamUIDs() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns an array containing all unique parameter names (UIDs) in this message.
    getParent() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the SyxDataStruct containing this parameter.
    getPart(int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Gets a message part.
    getPart(String) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Gets a message part.
    getParts() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns all parts of this message.
    getPath(Class<?>, String, int) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Returns an absolute path relative to a class file.
    getPname() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the parameter name in the SyxDataStruct containing this parameter.
    getProperty(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.test.ASyxTestCase
    Returns the test case property with the specified key.
    getStatus() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Returns the status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7) of the system exclusive message.
    getStatusName(int) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Returns a human-readable name for a MIDI status byte.
    getTape() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.SysexRecorder
    Returns the recorder's tape.

    Basic coding examples.

    getType() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the parameter type.
    getUID() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns the unique parameter name in the SyxMessage.
    getValueNames() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Returns an array of names for all permissible MIDI values in case of enumerated value names parameters or null in case of enumerated integer values or range parameters.
